evidence_labels.derivation_reason: The profile needs a reviewable evidence label for the decision that an ICT-related incident was classified as major and for the classification time that drives the initial-notification clock.
evidence_labels.label: Classification committee / decision record
evidence_labels.review_note: This is supporting evidence for auditability. It is not asserted as a mandatory legal attachment in the source instruments.

evidence_labels.derivation_reason: The profile needs a reviewable evidence label for the detection timestamp, because detection time supports chronology and the outer reporting limit.
evidence_labels.label: Detection system log excerpt
evidence_labels.review_note: This is supporting evidence for auditability. It is not asserted as a mandatory legal attachment in the source instruments.

non_claims: Evidence labels are ActProof review artefacts, not automatic legal attachment requirements.
The evidence label map does not prove the factual truth of evidence.
The evidence label map does not prove DORA compliance or authority acceptance.
Evidence labels remain reviewable and challengeable.
title: Human-authored DORA evidence labels for initial notification
